full_text:
Wang Jun (Pengzu) 王浚 (彭祖)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Jun (王浚), styledPengzu (彭祖). A successful general under Sima Yan, he fought during the War of Eight Princes but was killed by Shi Le. Wang Jun was affiliated with the Jin Dynasty. Wang Jun lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty period of Chinese history.
